title: CompactIssue v1
description: Index projection of a beads Issue for agent consumption. Omits fat text bodies and replaces dependency edges with scalar counts plus a single parent id.

issue_type.description: Bead type. Common values: bug, feature, task, epic, chore. Any non-empty string is accepted to support ecosystem extensions.

parent_id.description: If present, the id of the parent issue linked via a parent-child dependency.

blockers_count.description: Count of blocking dependencies stored on this issue.

unblocks_count.description: Count of other issues that depend on this one via a blocking edge.

children_count.description: Count of issues whose parent-child edge points at this issue.

relates_count.description: Count of related-to edges stored on this issue (local only; does not mirror reverse edges).

is_blocked.description: True when at least one incoming blocker is still open or in_progress. Closed blockers do not block.

created_by_session.description: Session identifier of the creator agent, sourced from metadata.created_by_session (bridge surface until upstream first-class column lands).

claimed_by_session.description: Session identifier of the claiming agent, sourced from metadata.claimed_by_session.

closed_by_session.description: Session identifier of the closing agent, sourced from the first-class closed_by_session column.
